{
  EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class EmployeeSheetBuilderExtensions
{
    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> EmailColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, string>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Email, configuration);

    public static void EmailHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, string> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, string, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Email);

    public static void EmailInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Email, value);

    public static void EmailExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Email);

    public static ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> AgeColumn(
        this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder,
        Action<ColumnConfig<global::Employee, int>> configuration)
        => builder.Column(_ => _.Age, configuration);

    public static void AgeHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Order(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.Width(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, int? value)
        => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
        => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Employee, int> value)
        => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.Format(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, string value)
        => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, Func<global::Employee, int, string?> value)
        => builder.Render(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Filter(_ => _.Age);

    public static void AgeInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder, bool value)
        => builder.Include(_ => _.Age, value);

    public static void AgeExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Employee> builder)
        => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Age);
}
